title: New Vulnerability Reveals Yet Another Problem with AI Browsers
description: A new attack demonstrates how AI browsers can be manipulated into bypassing safeguards, raising concerns about data security and autonomous actions.

title: Anthropic Launches Claude Sonnet 5, Bringing Lower-Cost AI Agents Closer to Flagship Performance
description: Claude Sonnet 5 delivers near-Opus performance at a fraction of the cost, reflecting Anthropic's strategy to make always-on AI agents practical for everyday business use.
